## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this? e.g. npm run dev, npm run build:app, manual steps -->

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build:app` (if Rust/Tauri touched)
- [ ] Manual test steps listed below

## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or personal paths committed
- [ ] New UI strings added to **all** `src/locales/*.js` files (and `setup_i18n.json` if applicable)
- [ ] CSP / capability allow-list unchanged, or change is justified above
- [ ] No `Co-authored-by` trailers for AI tools
